<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->
- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Project: Django REST API backend for Milkman dairy delivery platform with SQLite, supporting React frontend

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Created Django project structure with apps: users, products, orders, subscriptions

- [x] Customize the Project
	Implemented all models, serializers, views, and API endpoints matching frontend requirements

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions required for Django development

- [x] Compile the Project
	Database configured and migrations applied successfully

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Backend running at http://127.0.0.1:8000/ with all API endpoints operational

- [x] Launch the Project
	Django development server launched and tested

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md and copilot-instructions.md updated with full details
